sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n80286" key="pezobate/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πεζο-βᾰτέω</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὸ πέλαγος</foreign>, <sense id="n80286.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">walk</tr_> the sea, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.551</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antiphil.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
